tasks.label: Run Test Runner
tasks.command: $py = 'C:\Users\zhiha\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\python.exe'; & $py response_test.py --json | Out-File -FilePath test_cases.json -Encoding utf8; Start-Process $py -ArgumentList '-m', 'http.server', '3000' -WorkingDirectory '${workspaceFolder}' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Start-Process 'http://localhost:3000/test_runner.html'

tasks.label: Open Evaluator
tasks.command: $py = 'C:\Users\zhiha\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\python.exe'; $node = 'C:\Program Files\nodejs\node.exe'; $file = [uri]::EscapeDataString('${input:evaluatorJsonFile}'); $batch = '${input:batchSize}'; $url = 'http://localhost:3000/evaluator.html?batchSize=' + $batch + '&file=' + $file; cmd /c start "reviewer-agent" /min "$node" agents\reviewer-agent.mjs; Start-Process $py -ArgumentList '-m', 'http.server', '3000' -WorkingDirectory '${workspaceFolder}' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Start-Process $url

tasks.label: Convert + Open Evaluator
tasks.command: $py = 'C:\Users\zhiha\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\python.exe'; $node = 'C:\Program Files\nodejs\node.exe'; $inputPath = '${input:transcriptFile}'; & $py txt_to_json.py $inputPath --workers '${input:workers}' --ollama-model 'llama3.2:latest'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; $jsonPath = [System.IO.Path]::ChangeExtension($inputPath, '.json') -replace '\\', '/'; $file = [uri]::EscapeDataString($jsonPath); $url = 'http://localhost:3000/evaluator.html?batchSize=5&file=' + $file; cmd /c start "reviewer-agent" /min "$node" agents\reviewer-agent.mjs; Start-Process $py -ArgumentList '-m', 'http.server', '3000' -WorkingDirectory '${workspaceFolder}' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Start-Process $url
